subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-08-25
subcodes.first_line: O Thou kind God! In the utmost state of humility and submission do we entreat and supplicate
subcodes.subjects: @continual renewal of creation, @status of kings; future of monarchy, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual springtime, @station of the Manifestation of God, @need for an educator, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @spiritual transformation, @connection between material and spiritual worlds, @The Holy Spirit
